description:
Support for the 2026 Steam Controller in Non-Steam games, with DualShock4 and DualSense Support.


This fork turns a Steam Controller into a virtual Xbox 360, DualShock 4, experimental DualSense, or Switch Pro Controller. The main branch goal is parity with the original Xbox 360 behavior plus native PlayStation/Nintendo controller features for games that support them.

Add Steam Controller Bluetooth LE support.
Update HidHide matching for Bluetooth HID over GATT devices.
Keep wired USB and Steam Controller Puck discovery paths supported.
